index.title: Clients
index.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, company or email…

empty.noneDescription: Add the first client to the agency's portfolio.
empty.filteredDescription: Try adjusting the search or the status filter.

archiveConfirm.title: Archive {{name}}?
archiveConfirm.description: The client leaves the active list. You can reactivate them later via the archived filter.

brand.title: Brand
brand.emptyDescription: Define this client's voice, @handle, colors and logo — used in creative generation and AI prompts.
brand.carouselHint: This is how this client's carousels are generated.

positioningSection.title: Positioning
positioningSection.emptyDescription: Describe the brand and let AI build the positioning — it becomes AI context on every ticket in your campaigns.

social.title: Social networks

disconnectConfirm.title: Disconnect {{network}}?
disconnectConfirm.description: Posts scheduled on this account will stop publishing until you reconnect.

social.selfServeTitle: Let the client connect on their own
social.selfServeDescription: Send a link and the client connects their own networks with their own login — no account needed here.
social.connectLinkCopied: Link copied! Send it to the client so they can connect their own networks.
social.manualHint: Or connect this client's networks yourself. Campaign tickets publish to these accounts.

portal.title: Client portal
portal.linkDescription: No login: the client sees the campaigns, follows the board in real time, approves creatives and reads the reports.
portal.copySuccess: Link copied! Send it to the client to follow campaigns and approve creatives.

rotateConfirm.title: Renew the portal link?
rotateConfirm.description: The current link stops working immediately. Anyone with the old link loses access and you'll need to send the new one to the client.

projects.title: Campaigns
projects.emptyDescription: This client has no campaigns yet.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.emptyDescription: No invoices have been issued for this client.

meetings.description: All of the team's meetings with this client.
meetings.emptyDescription: Schedule the first one — it lands on your Google Calendar with a Meet link.

cancelConfirm.title: Cancel "{{title}}"?
cancelConfirm.description: The meeting will be removed from the agenda and from Google Calendar.

site.title: Website
site.description: Import everything from the brand's landing page.

brief.title: Description
brief.description: Describe the brand — AI fills in the positioning.

brandFields.voicePlaceholder: Personality and tone (e.g.: warm, playful, expert).

carousel.styleHint: Background used when AI generates carousels for this client.
carousel.bgHint: Upload a file or pick a creative from the platform.

palette.title: Carousel colors (from the image)
palette.analyzing: Analyzing the image to pick the colors…
palette.noBackground: Set a background image — AI picks the colors automatically.
palette.note: Colors exclusive to the image background, separate from the brand colors (used on gradient and white backgrounds).

siteImport.banner: Paste the brand's website / landing page link. AI reads the page and automatically fills in name, contact, visual identity (logo and colors) and the positioning. You review everything before saving.
siteImport.label: Brand website
siteImport.hint: Fills in name, email, phone, @, colors, logo and positioning — you can skip and fill in manually.

brief.banner: Describe the brand in your own words — products, audience, differentiators, tone of voice. AI fills in the structured positioning and you review it in the next steps.
brief.label: Brand description
brief.placeholder: E.g.: We're a premium artisanal bakery in São Paulo. We sell made-to-order cakes and sweets for parties. Our audience is upper-middle-class moms who value natural ingredients. We speak in a warm, familiar way…

statement.label: Positioning (synthesis)
statement.placeholder: The positioning paragraph shows up here. Generate it with AI in the description step or write it manually.

backgroundPicker.description: Use an image from a platform creative as the carousel background.
backgroundPicker.emptyDescription: Generate or upload an image creative to use it as the background.

example.dialogDescription: {{style}} · this is how this client's carousels are generated. Illustrative content — AI writes the real copy from the positioning.
example.hookBody: Swipe to see how we can help you.
example.ctaBody: Talk to us and start today.

rotatePortalLink.success: Portal link renewed. The previous link no longer works.

synthesize.error: Couldn't generate the positioning with AI.
